title: Arlong’s Rule Tightens Around Nami
scene: On pages 13–16, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. The scale of Arlong’s rule becomes clearer as the fish-men dominate the island and its people.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Hey Nami, what're you gonna do with him?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: lock him up for now! I'll put an end to him later.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Arlong!!!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: What is it, my fellow brother?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: There was another long-nosed human who got away!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...usopp? Damn, so they found out about him after all...

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: I think he's probably hiding in Cocoyashi village somewhere...

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: Cocoyashi village...? It just so happened that I had some business to attend to there...

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: Cocoyashi Village

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Hey! Arlong's coming this way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: What does he need from us...?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: He just collected our tribute!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's probably because my weapons were found...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Everyone go inside your homes.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Gen...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: SPIN SPIN SPIN...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: He's here!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Are you the one?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The one found in possession of weapons, 3 days ago?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: That's right.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: spin spin

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Can't a person even have a hobbyist collection under your rule?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I've always liked looking at weapons.

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: cocoyashi village resident GENZOU

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: No, I'm afraid not. Only violence and evil can come forth from weapons.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: They're the greatest threat to peace.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: He's huge!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: So that's arlong!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: He's inhuman!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: He is a fishman.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But... it looks like Nami didn't come with him.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: She's probably at Arlong Park.

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: I've got 20 villages under my rule...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And "Rebels" are quite a nuisance for us, your rulers...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I destroyed the rebelliious port town of Gosa to teach a lesson to all the other towns!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: If someone fails to pay his "tribute,"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Then that means he intends to rebel against us!

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
